content.text: I'll help you check the database users on your Mittwald MySQL database. Let me start by listing the databases in project p-ucvxdj, then get the users for the 'PHP App Database'.

input.prompt:
The user wants to:
1. List all databases in Mittwald project p-ucvxdj
2. List the users for the 'PHP App Database' (mysql_u6ig4z)

Use the mittwald MCP tools to:
1. Call mcp__mittwald__mittwald_database_mysql_list_databases with projectId "p-ucvxdj" to list all databases
2. Call mcp__mittwald__mittwald_database_mysql_list_database_users with databaseId "mysql_u6ig4z" to list users for that specific database

Return the results showing:
- All databases in the project
- All users configured for the PHP App Database (mysql_u6ig4z)
- Include usernames, hostnames, and any other relevant user information

content.text:
The user wants to:
1. List all databases in Mittwald project p-ucvxdj
2. List the users for the 'PHP App Database' (mysql_u6ig4z)

Use the mittwald MCP tools to:
1. Call mcp__mittwald__mittwald_database_mysql_list_databases with projectId "p-ucvxdj" to list all databases
2. Call mcp__mittwald__mittwald_database_mysql_list_database_users with databaseId "mysql_u6ig4z" to list users for that specific database

Return the results showing:
- All databases in the project
- All users configured for the PHP App Database (mysql_u6ig4z)
- Include usernames, hostnames, and any other relevant user information

input.command: claude mcp call mittwald mittwald_database_mysql_list_databases --projectId p-ucvxdj
input.description: List all MySQL databases in project p-ucvxdj
List users for PHP App Database mysql_u6ig4z

tool_use_result:
Error: Exit code 1
error: unknown command 'call'

Error: Exit code 1
error: unknown command 'call'

content.content:
Usage: claude mcp [options] [command]

Configure and manage MCP servers

Options:
  -h, --help                                     Display help for command

Commands:
  serve [options]                                Start the Claude Code MCP server
  add [options] <name> <commandOrUrl> [args...]  Add an MCP server to Claude Code.
  
  Examples:
    # Add HTTP server:
    claude mcp add --transport http sentry https://mcp.sentry.dev/mcp
  
    # Add SSE server:
    claude mcp add --transport sse asana https://mcp.asana.com/sse
  
    # Add stdio server:
    claude mcp add --transport stdio airtable --env AIRTABLE_API_KEY=YOUR_KEY -- npx -y airtable-mcp-server
  remove [options] <name>                        Remove an MCP server
  list                                           List configured MCP servers
  get <name>                                     Get details about an MCP server
  add-json [options] <name> <json>               Add an MCP server (stdio or SSE) with a JSON string
  add-from-claude-desktop [options]              Import MCP servers from Claude Desktop (Mac and WSL only)
  reset-project-choices                          Reset all approved and rejected project-scoped (.mcp.json) servers within this project
  help [command]                                 display help for command

tool_use_result.stdout:
Usage: claude mcp [options] [command]

Configure and manage MCP servers

Options:
  -h, --help                                     Display help for command

Commands:
  serve [options]                                Start the Claude Code MCP server
  add [options] <name> <commandOrUrl> [args...]  Add an MCP server to Claude Code.
  
  Examples:
    # Add HTTP server:
    claude mcp add --transport http sentry https://mcp.sentry.dev/mcp
  
    # Add SSE server:
    claude mcp add --transport sse asana https://mcp.asana.com/sse
  
    # Add stdio server:
    claude mcp add --transport stdio airtable --env AIRTABLE_API_KEY=YOUR_KEY -- npx -y airtable-mcp-server
  remove [options] <name>                        Remove an MCP server
  list                                           List configured MCP servers
  get <name>                                     Get details about an MCP server
  add-json [options] <name> <json>               Add an MCP server (stdio or SSE) with a JSON string
  add-from-claude-desktop [options]              Import MCP servers from Claude Desktop (Mac and WSL only)
  reset-project-choices                          Reset all approved and rejected project-scoped (.mcp.json) servers within this project
  help [command]                                 display help for command
